name: Training Center XML (TCX)
spec: TCX is an XML format rooted at <TrainingCenterDatabase>. Activities live under <Activities>/<Activity Sport="Biking">, each split into one or more <Lap> elements that contain a <Track> of <Trackpoint> samples. A Trackpoint carries <Time> (ISO-8601), optional <Position> (<LatitudeDegrees>, <LongitudeDegrees>), <AltitudeMeters>, <DistanceMeters> (cumulative), <HeartRateBpm><Value>, and <Cadence> (cycling rpm). Power is not in core TCX; it is carried in <Extensions> via the Garmin Activity Extension TPX element: <TPX><Watts>..</Watts><Speed>..</Speed></TPX>. Unlike GPX, distance is stored cumulatively per point.

constraints.note: HeartRateBpm wraps the integer in a child <Value> element.
Power lives in Extensions/TPX/Watts, not as a first-class Trackpoint child.
DistanceMeters is cumulative from activity start, not per-segment.

conversion_notes.note: Map Trackpoint -> trkpt; Position -> lat/lon; AltitudeMeters -> ele; TPX Watts -> power extension.
Convert degrees -> semicircles; cumulative DistanceMeters maps directly to the record distance field.

glossary.definition: Garmin Activity Extension element carrying Watts/Speed per Trackpoint.
A subdivision of an Activity; each Lap holds its own Track of Trackpoints.
